title: Plan and implement a biosecurity program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and implement a biosecurity program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Scope threats and hazards for a biosecurity program

pcs.text: Collate and interpret biosecurity advice, standards and protocols according to the biosecurity plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collate and interpret biosecurity advice, standards and protocols according to the biosecurity plan.
